events.data: smoke test
Hive-Mind ledger wired to all agents: Rook, Ralph, Nova, CodeMaster. SOUL.md files updated, syscheck pipeline and morning briefing now auto-log.

Ralph switched from ollama/ralph-qwen-tools to google/gemini-2.5-flash-lite. Nova exec settings fixed (sandbox off, ask off). Claude discord account disabled. Hive-Mind ledger wired to all agents and Claude Code.

Deployed 5 improvements: 1) cron scripts wired to ledger 2) error interceptor service 3) daily token summary cron 4) playbooks directory with 5 fix recipes 5) updated all SOUL.md and MEMORY.md files
Nightly synthesis complete for 2026-03-14. TEAM HEALTH: 7 — Intermittent TTS and sandbox issues, but core functions remain stable.
Nightly Knowledge Consolidation system deployed. Cron at 2AM, Gemini synthesis, TEAM-INTEL.md injected to all agents. First test run: TEAM HEALTH 7/10.

Auto-heal system deployed. Error interceptor now dispatches CodeMaster for known playbook matches. Fallback to direct script fix. Escalates to Rook after 3 failures.

Fixed openrouter-network-lost for nova: Transient OpenRouter connection drop on free-tier model. No restart command available for isolated sessions — next cron heartbeat (every 2h) will auto-retry. No config changes needed.
Direct fix: cleared sessions for nova (openrouter-network-lost)
All Ollama local models deleted. No local inference — all agents on cloud models. RTX 3050 VRAM freed.

Wake-on-demand dispatcher deployed (5min poll). Nova heartbeat reduced 2h→6h. Rook SOUL.md compressed 315→191 lines. Nova SOUL.md compressed 307→106 lines. Removed stale Ollama refs, duplicate sections, fake multimodal capabilities.
Nova heartbeat reduced from 1h to 6h (was missed in previous crash). Services restarted.

Swarm v2 upgrade: (1) Task queue with dependencies and chains — agents pick up, execute, and complete structured tasks. (2) Wake-dispatcher now sends task context in wake messages. (3) Auto-heal verification — regression detection within 30 min. (4) Nightly consolidation auto-generates research tasks for Nova from rotating backlog. (5) Office badges/scores merged into TEAM-INTEL. (6) All heartbeats reduced to 6h safety nets (wake-on-demand handles real work). (7) Removed stale Ollama refs from syscheck/briefing. (8) All SOUL.md files updated with task queue instructions.
GUARDIAN auto-repaired: gateway-unknown, node-unknown, interceptor-unknown
GUARDIAN auto-repaired: gateway-unknown, node-unknown, interceptor-unknown

Windows Guardian v2 deployed. File-based architecture: WSL cron writes health status + picks up repair requests. No WSL calls from hidden PowerShell (they hang). Auto-recovers: WSL down, service failures, port issues, cron death, disk full. Escalates via Windows toast after 3 fails. Startup folder auto-launch.
